title: Brotein 1.0 App Store upload — validation failed (icon alpha + Info.plist)
html:
Xcode / Transporter dialog — Brotein 1.0 (1) upload to App Store Connect on May 20, 2025 7:53 AM failed validation with two issues: (1) the large app icon contains an alpha channel / transparency, (2) CFBundleDocumentTypes in Info.plist must be an array of dictionaries with CFBundleTypeName. First documented App Store submission attempt for Brotein — predates the eventual launch by weeks.

TL;DR

  • Brotein v1.0(1) failed first App Store validation at 7:53 AM May 20, 2025.
  • Two validation failures — opaque-icon rule + malformed CFBundleDocumentTypes.
  • Establishes the submission timeline for Brotein — May 20 first attempt ≪ later "Brotein to Market" goal noted on 6/30.
  • Same morning as the May 20 reverse engineering homework crunch — Yahir was juggling capstone, app launch, and security simultaneously.
  • Likely the trigger for the iconography / Info.plist fixes that show up later in the May 30 todos.

brotein · xcode · app store connect · swiftui · 2025 05 30 todos

related.label: Todos — Austin move + Brotein launch + summer 2025 planning
